description: Pin system usability improvements: z-index fix (portal popover), single-click select + drag, double-click edit, remove Save button, subtle delete option, click-outside-to-close, P key toggles visibility, PP double-press toggles panel.
steps: Step 1 - Add pin selection and dragging state: Add selectedPinId state, draggingPin state (with startX, startY, offsetX, offsetY). Add pinsVisible state for toggling all pin visibility at once.
Step 2 - Change keyboard shortcuts: P key now toggles pin visibility (show/hide all pins). PP double-press (within 300ms) toggles pin panel. Shift+P still drops pin at center.
Step 3 - Change pin click behavior: Single click selects pin (sets selectedPinId, shows ring). Double click opens edit popup. Add drag support for selected pins.

Step 4 - Move edit popover outside transform layer: Render the edit popover as a fixed/absolute positioned element relative to the viewport (outside the canvas transform container) to guarantee it renders above everything.
Step 5 - Simplify edit popup: Remove Save button. Add subtle delete option (small trash icon or text link). Click outside closes popup.
acceptance_criteria: Running `npx vite build` succeeds without errors
Single click on pin selects it with visual ring indicator
Double click on pin opens edit popup
Selected pin can be dragged to new position
Pin position saves automatically on drop
Edit popup renders above all canvas content (portal outside transform layer)
No Save button in edit popup
Subtle delete option available in edit popup
Clicking outside edit popup closes it
P key toggles all pin visibility
Shift+P still creates pin at center
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/mind-map && npx vite build` and confirm it completes with exit code 0
